text: On the regulatory front, Amazon published a detailed rebuttal to a Wall Street Journal report alleging the company raised prices on popular items following tariff announcements by the Trump administration. This dispute occurs against a backdrop of easing trade tensions, with markets responding positively to a US-EU tariff pact that has reduced concerns about potential trade war escalation. The pricing controversy highlights ongoing scrutiny of Amazon's market practices during a period of heightened political attention to corporate pricing strategies.
